books.title: The Nebius Cloud Atlas
books.author: Nia Vector
books.description: A bright science-fiction field guide to cloud cities, inference markets, and the agents who route between them.

books.title: Pinecones in the Vector Garden
books.author: Ada Embedding
books.description: A cozy mystery where every clue is hidden in a semantic garden tended by a very opinionated retriever.

books.title: Agent at the End of the Prompt
books.author: Lila Chain
books.description: A playful novella about a book agent that learns when to answer, when to retrieve, and when to ask for approval.

books.title: The Checkout Graph
books.author: Max Token
books.description: A brisk startup satire about a LangGraph node that refuses to create payment links without human approval.

books.title: Embeddings & Espresso
books.author: Clara Context
books.description: A café novel about baristas, book clubs, vector search, and the perfect recommendation over a double shot.

books.title: The Retrieval Society
books.author: Jonas Index
books.description: An adventure about librarians who can find any lost paragraph, provided the metadata is not cursed.

books.title: Guardrails for Dreaming Machines
books.author: Mira Policy
books.description: A warm speculative essay collection about safety, refusal, and the strange poetry of well-bounded agents.

books.title: Ten Thousand Tiny Agents
books.author: Theo Router
books.description: A comic ensemble novel where tiny specialist agents argue over tools, memory, and who gets to write the final answer.

books.title: The Sandbox Bookshop
books.author: Samira Stripe
books.description: A cheerful commerce fable about a test-mode bookshop where every checkout is safe, reversible, and fake.

books.title: When the Model Learned to Read
books.author: Lucie Latency
books.description: A thoughtful near-future novel about an AI model discovering literature, timing budgets, and the value of citations.
